text: While you’re waiting for the next book, why not dive into our other COMPLETE series: The Age of Vampires Saga? Two totally different but totally feisty twins face the reign of the vampire princes who’ve taken control of America. With one in the hands of a fierce slayer and the other sent to the vampire royals, will they survive falling for the ruthless men who are sworn enemies of each other..?
